description: Lock edge removals made while source-checking Ancient, Renaissance, and Industrial basics on 2026-06-18.

checks.reason: Earliest copper smelting evidence predates securely sourced bellows; forced-draft bellows are not a hard prerequisite for basic smelting.
Early administrative grain-accounting tablets can predate formal scribe schools; scribe schools are training infrastructure, not a prerequisite for the first accounting tablets.
Neolithic obsidian exchange begins millennia before portable balance scales; scales are not a prerequisite for lithic exchange.
Linear perspective is a geometric projection/drawing method and does not require pigment technology for first emergence.
Goodyear's 1839 vulcanization was a chemical heat/sulfur process; steam power is industrial context, not a first-known prerequisite.
The 1827 Niepce heliograph used bitumen on pewter, not silver halide chemistry; silver nitrate belongs to later photographic processes.
Drais's 1817 running machine predates Goodyear's 1839 vulcanization; rubber tires are later bicycle improvements.
The first bicycle/running-machine was a hand-built prototype lineage; mass production is a later adoption and scaling dependency.
Early alchemy/material practice is broader than copper smelting and cannot require the later source-backed smelting node.
Combined-arms tactics are broader than and predate the Roman manipular/cohort system.
State medical supply storage does not require Pompeian/Roman surgical instrument sets as a first-known prerequisite.
Triage/sorting care practice is not dependent on the later source-backed Roman surgical instrument set evidence.
Medical case notes are a record-keeping practice and do not require a later surgical instrument set.
Self-propelled torpedo development is not dependent on Nobel dynamite; explosives lineage is contextual, not a hard prerequisite.
Pasteurization heat treatment predates formal Koch-era germ theory and should not require it.
Listerian antiseptic/aseptic surgery drew on Pasteurian fermentation ideas but predates the 1876 Koch germ-theory proof anchor.
Jennerian vaccination predates formal germ theory by decades.
Compressed-air tools do not require source-backed 1839 vulcanized rubber for first emergence.
Early mandatory vaccination campaigns in the 1840s and 1850s predate mechanical refrigeration as a hard prerequisite.
Laboratory diagnostic medicine has chemical/microscopy roots that predate formal Koch-era germ theory.
Factory safety codes and inspectorates predate industrial time clocks as a hard prerequisite.
Heavy cavalry predates full plate armor; plate is a later equipment specialization.
Heraldry predates full plate armor and should not require it as a first-known prerequisite.
University curricula at Bologna should not require later formalized degree structures as a prerequisite.
University curricula and institutions predate or co-develop with scholasticism; scholasticism is not a hard first prerequisite.
Charitable hospital networks predate 1377 quarantine law; quarantine is later public-health infrastructure.
Korean movable metal type predates Gutenberg-style press printing, so the press cannot be a prerequisite.
Early Genoese/Venetian municipal debt predates later bill-of-exchange clearing infrastructure.
Early municipal debt predates later merchant-banking-house infrastructure as a hard prerequisite.
Plague pesthouses and isolation care should not require the 1377 formal quarantine anchor as a hard prerequisite.
Bell founding can use furnace/foundry practice without requiring source-backed medieval blast furnaces.
Insulin therapy began in 1922 and cannot require 1937 clinical blood banking.
Galleon design is maritime technology that does not require the broader exploration-global node as a prerequisite.
Early musketry formations used matchlocks/arquebuses and cannot require later French flintlocks.
Pike-and-shot formations predate later flintlock muskets; flintlock is a later weapon subtype.
Oil painting is a medium and technique that does not require later formal linear perspective.
Life tables and demographic tabulation predate Pascal-Fermat formal probability theory.
Experimental controls are methodological practice and do not require formal probability theory.
Public lottery finance predates formal probability theory; probability is later analysis, not prerequisite.
Insurance pricing practice predates formal probability theory; formal probability is later refinement.
Comparative anatomy collections do not require public anatomical theaters as a hard prerequisite.
Public science lectures are broader than and need not require anatomical theater infrastructure.
Anatomical specimen collections can exist outside permanent public anatomical theaters.
Coal mining should remain anchored to documented medieval European mining references rather than the Industrial era default.
Roman concrete should remain compatible with source-backed volcanic ash/pozzolana chronology.
Documented coal mining predates the 1712 Newcomen steam engine; steam engines later scaled and dewatered mines but are not a first-known prerequisite.
